title: Refund processing SLA
body: Standard refunds are processed within 5 to 10 business days after approval. Billing must verify the original payment method before issuing credit. Escalate duplicate charges to the billing specialists queue immediately.

title: Account access and password reset
body: Users locked out should complete identity verification before a password reset link is sent. Never share passwords in plain text. After three failed attempts, temporary lockout applies for 30 minutes.

title: Data export and privacy
body: Customers may request a copy of their data under applicable privacy regulations. Exports are generated within 30 days. Remove personal identifiers from internal ticket notes before sharing externally.

title: Support tone and empathy
body: Acknowledge the customer's issue explicitly, apologize when the company is at fault, and provide one clear next step with a timeline. Avoid dismissive language and vague promises without owners.
